skills: Kalpesh is a full-stack developer with strengths in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express, MySQL, MongoDB, PHP, Firebase, GitHub, and Postman. He focuses on building responsive interfaces, practical APIs, and clean user experiences.
projects: Kalpesh has built an e-commerce admin portal using PHP and MySQL, a thrift shopping Android app using Kotlin and Firebase, and a campsite booking website using React. His work spans admin tools, mobile commerce flows, and responsive booking interfaces.
experience: Kalpesh has hands-on experience in full-stack development, quality assurance testing, SEO strategy, Android app development, and deployment-oriented workflows. He enjoys combining polished UI with reliable implementation.
